title: BEM-842 Claude OAuth A
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 11:23 (UTC+3)'
changed=[]
patched=[]
for wf_path in ['.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-mailbox.yml']:
    p=Path(wf_path)
    if not p.exists():
        continue
    text=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
    old=text
    # Remove env-only OAuth wiring from Claude action step; action expects with.claude_code_oauth_token.
    text=text.replace('        env:\n          CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}\n        with:\n          anthropic_api_key: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}\n', '        with:\n          claude_code_oauth_token: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}\n')
    text=text.replace('        env:\n          CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}\n        with:\n', '        with:\n          claude_code_oauth_token: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}\n')
    text=text.replace('          anthropic_api_key: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}\n', '')
    # If with exists but oauth input absent, add it before prompt.
    if 'uses: anthropics/claude-code-action@v1' in text and 'claude_code_oauth_token:' not in text:
        text=text.replace('        with:\n          prompt: |\n', '        with:\n          claude_code_oauth_token: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}\n          prompt: |\n')
    if text != old:
        p.write_text(text)
        changed.append(str(p))
        patched.append({'workflow':str(p),'auth':'claude_code_oauth_token_only'})
# Add operator setup doc without secrets.
doc=Path('governance/reports/bem842_claude_oauth_variant_a_operator_steps.md')
doc.write_text('# BEM-842 | Claude OAuth Variant A | Operator Steps'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'1. Install/verify Claude GitHub App access for repository bereznyi-aleksandr/ai-devops-system.'+sep+'2. On a local machine with Claude Code, run: claude setup-token'+sep+'3. Copy the generated OAuth token.'+sep+'4. In GitHub repository Settings -> Secrets and variables -> Actions -> New repository secret, create/update CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN.'+sep+'5. Do not add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for this variant. The workflows now use only claude_code_oauth_token.'+sep+'6. After secret is saved, run BEM-843 smoke: dispatch result -> Claude runtime state -> real Claude response.'+sep+'No secrets in repo.'+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-842','status':'claude_oauth_variant_a_workflows_patched' if changed else 'no_workflow_change_needed','patched':patched,'operator_required':'Set GitHub Actions secret CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN generated by claude setup-token; install/verify Claude GitHub App access.','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem842_apply_claude_oauth_variant_a.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem842_apply_claude_oauth_variant_a.md').write_text('# BEM-842 | Apply Claude OAuth Variant A | '+state['status']+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem842_next.md').write_text('Next: operator sets CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN secret, then run BEM-843 smoke. Operator participation is required only for external GitHub/Claude secret setup.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-842'+sep+sep+'Status: '+state['status']+sep+'Next: after secret is set, run Claude OAuth smoke.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(changed+[str(doc),'governance/state/bem842_apply_claude_oauth_variant_a.json','governance/reports/bem842_apply_claude_oauth_variant_a.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem842_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Applied Claude Variant A by changing Claude workflows to OAuth-only claude_code_oauth_token and writing operator setup steps without secrets')
"""
No issue comments.
